meaning: n.[电子]光电晶体管,光敏晶体(三极)管
examples: Optocoupler, Phototransistor Output, With Base Connection.
Such MSM structure can also be formed into a transverse phototransistor with its common-emitter current gain from 2 to '4.
The phototransistor was installed through holes in the top of the case, and enclosed in a brass tube that was painted black inside and out.
